case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. JESUS ALBERTO PADILLA ORELLANA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $760.47 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ORELLANA, JESUS ALBERTO PADILLA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-16-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $55.00) SERVED OCT-02-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ORELLANA, JESUS ALBERTO PADILLA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-16-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ORELLANA, JESUS ALBERTO PADILLA $630.82 PRINCIPAL, $92.39 INTEREST, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $808.21, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF: 615.82 PRINCIPAL PLUS PREJUDGMENT INTEREST AT CONTRACT RATE FROM 6/5/2018 PLUS ONE LATE FEE PLUS COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-16-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-16-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. REPRESENTED BY PRICILLA TOVAR, COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
